title: Warlord: Fury of the God Machine

curation.synopsis: Adeptus Titanicus dual-POV novel. The Pallidus Mor — a stoic Titan Legion still recovering from a near-disastrous Tyranid engagement — is reassigned to a forge world fallen to Chaos and forced to fight alongside the Imperial Hunters, an aristocratic legion whose princeps treat Pallidus Mor as common-stock and chase glory-kills rather than coordinate. Princeps Ferantha Krezoc of Warlord Gloria Vastator holds the line; Princeps Adrel Syagrius of Warlord Augustus Secutor drives the friction until the Chaos enemy forces unwilling cooperation. City-after-city Titan combat anchors the action; beneath it, an Omnissiah-versus-Emperor cult-axis keeps a slow drumbeat. A god-machine novel where the ego-war between Imperium legios runs louder than the Chaos enemy.
